c.d: The speed at which the app can transfer files between devices.
c.s: App reviews, developer specifications, user testing

c.d: The availability of the app on different platforms (iOS, Android, Windows, etc.).
The ease of use and intuitiveness of the app's interface.
The measures taken by the app to ensure the security of file transfers.
The maximum file size that can be transferred using the app.
Any extra features provided by the app, such as cloud storage integration, chat, etc.
The average rating given by users on app stores.
